{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220300212D52F0E279BC276D7CB6"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7586329748931822360","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，爱看，喜欢看，看到电视剧中的遗憾得到圆满，让我觉得生活也更有希望了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766332405,"group_id":"7351429586413964350","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw4la5EKd6vUM+Opc+NY8rY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"954032254092680","user_name":"瑶溪的阿碧瑟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"954032254092680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7351429586413964350","book_info":{"abstract":"【莲花楼更新ing～】
阿琅为修复自己受损的本命法宝破界珠去往各个世界收集法则，在途中捡到了个Buff系统，一个世界抽一个buff，偶尔接接外快，平复气运之子的遗憾。
献鱼：天道之子光环在身，我看看谁敢动我一下，我天道爸爸的九九雷劫可不和你开玩笑。
许我耀眼：天使临世，我以众生信仰护佑小外甥女许妍
临江仙：心声弹幕系统上线，可惜每天只可以选择一个人三句心声化作弹幕，收集足够多的心声可解锁会员等级，呈现更多心声。
莲花楼：带着游戏面板闯荡江湖，这把gg了，转头返魂花坛复活再来！碧茶之毒？胡桃大招死了都能给你拉回来
与凤行：天谴？顶着大道之子光环的我一个眼神天谴自动退散
光系异能、无限涅槃、绝世好运光环、乌鸦嘴、木系天赋、精灵体……
后续世界：云之羽、甄嬛传、承欢记、玉骨遥、千古玦尘、神隐……
已有世界：
1、献鱼：廖停雁cp司马焦
2、许我耀眼无cp（有点写崩了，不推荐）
3、临江仙无cp
4、入青云：弱水cp晁元（司徒岭）
5、欢乐颂&流星花园：主流星花园 邱莹莹cp道明寺 已完结
6、狙击蝴蝶：原创晴琅cp李雾 已完结
7、骄阳似我：原创言琅+神医系统cp林屿（已完结）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/bcd4465d4268bd242e2b1f7e07d65fc0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"柠檬挞宝","author_id":"","book_id":"7351429586413964350","book_name":"综影视之完成那些祈愿吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8a098","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6207人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548752562535547454","read_count":"6207","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"515105"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"267","tags":"女频衍生,系统,穿越,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2f89311d7908749147bd0c1fb1540544~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303621&x-signature=sMEDBSa2wV6PWojg4DR5qg71OF0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93489863273","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220300212D52F0E279BC276D7CB6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwar
